MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Camille Colarusso Plaintiff in propria persona.
No other appearances.

A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
